form.formComment: Consistent performer who is new here. Nice win last start by a neck at Ballarat (22.81) beating Trenton's Ace in a Maiden on April 13. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 4 length fourth (24.66) at Bendigo. Previous form sound including a win three back at Shepparton. Looks a leading contender on best and expected to bounce back.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a one length second (17.01) over 300m at this track and making it two placings on end. Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 1.5 lengths at Ballarat over 390m (22.63) beating Aston Adriana in T3 RSTW on April 13. Will not find this easy. Not keen.
